features.name: deeply nested bitwise NOT operations
features.description: Code should include deeply nested bitwise NOT operations where ~ is applied 6 or more times consecutively to an expression

features.name: deeply nested bitwise shift operations
features.description: Code should include deeply nested left and right shift operations combined with multiple layers of bitwise NOT

features.name: large bit width parameters with complex expressions
features.description: Code should include parameters defining large bit widths (64 or greater) used with deeply nested bitwise operations in a combinational always block
features.snippet: module dut #(parameter i_width=64, o_width=128)(input logic[i_width-1:0] a, b, output logic [o_width-1:0] out );
